response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video features two VTubers, Momosuzu Nene and Kanade, performing 'Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Hoshi'. 2. Researched 'Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Hoshi' lyrics and identified Kessoku Band as the original artist. 3. Identified the second song as 'Sayonara Memories' and researched lyrics, identifying supercell as the original artist. 4. Compiled the lyrics for both songs. 5. Formatted the scene data and lyrics into the requested JSON schema.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a live vocal performance by two VTubers, Momosuzu Nene and a guest performer (Kanade), followed by a solo performance by Momosuzu Nene. The first song performed as a duet is 'Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Hoshi' by Kessoku Band, and the second song performed solo by Nene is 'Sayonara Memories' by supercell.

scenes.description: Momosuzu Nene and Kanade perform 'Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Hoshi' as a duet on stage.
scenes.song_title: Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Hoshi
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 突然降る夕立 あぁ傘もないや嫌 空のご機嫌なんか知らない 季節の変わり目の服は 何着りゃいいんだろ 春と秋 どこいっちゃったんだよ 息も出来ない 情報の圧力 めまいの螺旋だ わたしはどこにいる こんなに こんなに 息の音がするのに 変だね 世界の音がしない 足りない 足りない 誰にも気づかれない 殴り書きみたいな音 出せない状態で叫んだよ 「ありのまま」なんて 誰に見せるんだ 馬鹿なわたしは歌うだけ ぶちまけちゃおうか 星に エリクサーに張り替える作業もなんとなくなんだ 欠けた爪を少し触る 半径300mmの体で 必死に鳴いてる 音楽にとっちゃ ココが地球だな 空気を握って 空を殴るよ なんにも起きない わたしは無力さ だけどさ その手で この鉄を弾いたら何かが変わって見えた…ような。 眩しい 眩しい そんなに光るなよ わたしのダサい影が より色濃くなってしまうだろ なんでこんな熱くなっちゃってんだ 止まんない 馬鹿なわたしは歌うだけ うるさいんだって 心臓 蒼い惑星 ひとりぼっち いっぱいの音を聞いてきた 回り続けて 幾億年 一瞬でもいいから…ああ聞いて 聴けよ わたし わたし わたしはここにいる 殴り書きみたいな音 出せない状態で叫んだよ なんかになりたい なりたい 何者かでいい 馬鹿なわたしは歌うだけ ぶちまけちゃおうか 星に
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Suddenly, a sun shower falls. Ah, I don't even have an umbrella. I don't know the sky's mood. What should I wear for this seasonal change? Spring and autumn, where did they go? I can't breathe. The pressure of information, it's a spiral of dizziness. Where am I? Even though I can hear my breathing so much, it's strange. I can't hear the world's sounds. It's not enough, it's not enough. No one notices me. I shouted with a sound like scribbles, in a state where I couldn't get it out. Who am I showing my 'true self' to? Foolish me, I just sing. Should I splatter it all onto the stars? Replacing the strings with Elixirs is just something I do. I touch my chipped nail a little. With a body with a radius of 300mm, I'm desperately crying out. To music, this place is the Earth. I grab the air and punch the sky. Nothing happens. I am powerless. But if I pluck this iron with those hands, something seemed to change... maybe. Dazzling, dazzling, don't shine so brightly. My uncool shadow will become even darker, won't it? Why have I become so hot? It won't stop. Foolish me, I just sing. 'It's noisy', my heart says. Blue planet. All alone, I've listened to so many sounds. Continuing to rotate for hundreds of millions of years. Even if it's just for an instant... Ah, listen, listen, I am here. I shouted with a sound like scribbles, in a state where I couldn't get it out. I want to become something, I want to become something. Anything will do. Foolish me, I just sing. Should I splatter it all onto the stars?
